meaning: n.讽刺画,漫画,讽刺描述法,歪曲(或拙劣)的模仿vt.画成漫画讽刺
examples: He had unfairly presented a caricature of my views.
Hall is angry at what he sees as a caricature of the training offered to modern-day social workers.
The first one was a button that said appeal for Neal with your caricature.
The grandiose Barack Obama was the personification of that attitude, if not a caricature of it.
